query:
-- 查询user信息
SELECT 'USER' as type, u.id, u.name, u.phone, u.roles
FROM users u
WHERE u.phone = '15321700153'

UNION ALL

-- 查询partner信息
SELECT 'PARTNER' as type, p.id, p.name, p.phone, NULL as roles
FROM partners p
WHERE p.phone = '15321700153'

UNION ALL

-- 查询user_role_cities信息
SELECT 'USER_ROLE_CITIES' as type, urc.id, urc.role, NULL as phone, urc.cities as roles
FROM user_role_cities urc
JOIN users u ON urc.userId = u.id
WHERE u.phone = '15321700153'

UNION ALL

-- 查询partner_cities信息
SELECT 'PARTNER_CITIES' as type, pc.id, c.name as city, pc.contractStatus as phone, NULL as roles
FROM partner_cities pc
JOIN partners p ON pc.partnerId = p.id
JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id
WHERE p.phone = '15321700153';
